message: Feishu/Lark MCP servers successfully connected. lark: npx @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp mcp (app_id=cli_a6b3f4e63b3b900e), feishu: feishu-mcp start-server (app_id=cli_a6b3f4e63b3b900e). Sync content staged. Full document upload requires next sync trigger.
